get.description: Retrieve public information for an organization identified by its slug.

eventsUrl.description: Public: URL to fetch organization events for live updates

members.description: List of organization members with public info

get.description: Retrieve all public labels associated with an organization.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this label belongs to

createdAt.description: Label creation timestamp in ISO format

get.description: Retrieve all public categories associated with an organization.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Specifies the sort order by creation date. Use asc for ascending or desc for descending.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this category belongs to

createdAt.description: Category creation timestamp in ISO format

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of public tasks for an organization.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Specifies the sort order by creation date. Use asc for ascending or desc for descending.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this task belongs to

shortId.description: Short numeric ID unique within the organization

createdAt.description: Task creation timestamp in ISO format

updatedAt.description: Task last update timestamp in ISO format

description.description: Task description in blocknote JSON format

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this category belongs to

createdAt.description: Category creation timestamp in ISO format

labels.description: List of labels associated with the task

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this label belongs to

createdAt.description: Label creation timestamp in ISO format

releaseId.description: ID of the release this task is associated with

voteCount.description: Number of votes the task has received

parentId.description: ID of the parent task if this is a subtask

get.description: Retrieve a public task by its short identifier.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this task belongs to

shortId.description: Short numeric ID unique within the organization

createdAt.description: Task creation timestamp in ISO format

updatedAt.description: Task last update timestamp in ISO format

description.description: Task description in blocknote JSON format

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this category belongs to

createdAt.description: Category creation timestamp in ISO format

labels.description: List of labels associated with the task

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this label belongs to

createdAt.description: Label creation timestamp in ISO format

releaseId.description: ID of the release this task is associated with

voteCount.description: Number of votes the task has received

parentId.description: ID of the parent task if this is a subtask

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of public comments for a task.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Specifies the sort order by creation date. Use asc for ascending or desc for descending.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this comment belongs to

taskId.description: ID of the task this comment is associated with

createdAt.description: Comment creation timestamp in ISO format

updatedAt.description: Comment last update timestamp in ISO format

content.description: Comment content in BlockNote JSON format

createdBy.description: User who created the comment, or null if user data is not available

parentId.description: ID of the parent comment if this is a reply, null if top-level

get.description: Retrieve paginated releases for the specified organization.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this release belongs to

description.description: Release description in blocknote JSON format

targetDate.description: Release target date in ISO format

releasedAt.description: Release date in ISO format, null if not released yet

createdBy.description: User who created the release, or null if user data is not available

createdAt.description: Release creation timestamp in ISO format

updatedAt.description: Release last update timestamp in ISO format

get.description: Retrieve the specified release for the organization.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this release belongs to

description.description: Release description in blocknote JSON format

targetDate.description: Release target date in ISO format

releasedAt.description: Release date in ISO format, null if not released yet

createdBy.description: User who created the release, or null if user data is not available

createdAt.description: Release creation timestamp in ISO format

updatedAt.description: Release last update timestamp in ISO format

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this task belongs to

shortId.description: Short numeric ID unique within the organization

createdAt.description: Task creation timestamp in ISO format

updatedAt.description: Task last update timestamp in ISO format

description.description: Task description in blocknote JSON format

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this category belongs to

createdAt.description: Category creation timestamp in ISO format

labels.description: List of labels associated with the task

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this label belongs to

createdAt.description: Label creation timestamp in ISO format

releaseId.description: ID of the release this task is associated with

voteCount.description: Number of votes the task has received

parentId.description: ID of the parent task if this is a subtask

get.description: Retrieve public status updates for the specified release.

releaseId.description: ID of the release this status update belongs to

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this status update belongs to

content.description: Content of the status update in BlockNote JSON format

contentHtml.description: Content of the status update rendered as HTML

contentMarkdown.description: Content of the status update rendered as Markdown

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the status update was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the status update was last updated

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the author was created

commentCount.description: Number of comments on the status update

get.description: Retrieve paginated public comments for the specified release.

releaseId.description: ID of the release this comment belongs to

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this comment belongs to

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the author was created

content.description: Content of the comment in BlockNote JSON format

contentHtml.description: Content of the comment rendered as HTML

contentMarkdown.description: Content of the comment rendered as Markdown

parentId.description: ID of the parent comment, if this is a reply

statusUpdateId.description: ID of the status update this comment belongs to

replyCount.description: Number of replies to this comment

count.description: Number of reactions of this type

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was last updated

get.description: Retrieve public replies for the specified comment.

releaseId.description: ID of the release this reply belongs to

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this reply belongs to

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the author was created

content.description: Content of the reply in BlockNote JSON format

contentHtml.description: Content of the reply rendered as HTML

contentMarkdown.description: Content of the reply rendered as Markdown

parentId.description: ID of the parent comment, if this is a reply

statusUpdateId.description: ID of the status update this reply belongs to

replyCount.description: Number of replies to this comment

count.description: Number of reactions of this type

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the reply was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the reply was last updated

get.description: Retrieve information about the authenticated user.
Retrieve organizations associated with the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new task in the organization.
Create a new timeline event for a task.
Create a new comment on a task.
